system.effect: Creates a completely new living being of any class (Natural, Spiritual, or Between Worlds). Its maximum level cannot exceed the caster’s. The caster chooses its Gnosis (up to 10 less than their own). Natural Beings with Gnosis ≤20 gain 50 DP for racial powers.
system.addedEffect: +1 level if the creation is Between Worlds or Spiritual, +10 DP if Natural.
